title: koeleria spicata subsp. alaskana
intro: Koeleria spicata subsp. alaskana, also known as Alaskan June grass, is a perennial grass species native to the Arctic tundra of Alaska. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Koeleria spicata subsp. alaskana include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory problems, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
